channel.title: Chess Puzzle on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Chess Puzzle on Aman Ahuja

item.title: Queen Problems
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: July 17, 2009.

Can you place three white queens and five black queens on a 5×5 chessboard so that no queen of one color attacks a queen of the other? The solution is unique, except rotations and reflections.

It took me longer than I first expected to solve this problem. The solution is:
